HMS Victory A large three-masted sailing warship with a dark hull and multiple flags, including a red ensign, is depicted at anchor in calm waters with a coastal town in the background.

Certificate of the Legion of Honor An official French award document from the National Order of the Legion of Honor, issued to a recipient named "Le Président de la République Française" with signatures and seals, dated 1918.
Helicopter landing in open field A helicopter hovers low over a grassy field as two people stand in the foreground observing, with trees and a distant vehicle visible in the background.
Victorian-style house A two-story Victorian house with purple and gray trim, gabled roof, and multiple windows, parked in front of a black pickup truck and a silver sedan under a partly cloudy sky.
Historic railway station and car A black-and-white photograph shows a wooden station building with a porch, a vintage railcar parked beside it, and a mountainous backdrop under a partly cloudy sky.

Railway tracks and station infrastructure Multiple parallel railway tracks stretch into the distance under a clear sky, with platforms, overhead structures, and industrial buildings visible in the background.

Church and municipal building in a town A white church with a steeple and a municipal building with a flagpole displaying the Swiss flag stand side by side under a clear blue sky, surrounded by trees and residential structures.
Man seated at a desk with a camera A man in formal 19th-century attire sits at a wooden desk, holding a camera with a lens and shutter, in a studio setting with ornate furniture.
Mountain landscape A prominent rocky peak rises above a forested valley under a clear blue sky, with distant hills and autumn-colored trees in the foreground.

Three individuals in an outdoor setting A police officer in uniform stands beside two women, one wearing a straw hat and light-colored dress, the other in a light blue patterned dress and white hat, with a background of trees and other people.
Urban residential buildings A cluster of multi-story apartment buildings with beige and orange facades stands behind a road with vehicles and a metal railing, under a clear blue sky.
Statue of a man A stone statue depicts a man in a short-sleeved shirt and trousers, standing with hands in pockets against a draped curtain backdrop.

Map of Argentina showing Union Cívica Radical's electoral performance A choropleth map of Argentina displays regional voting percentages for the Union Cívica Radical party, with a legend indicating support levels from 0–20% to 40–60%, and labels for national territories.

Basketball players on court A group of young female basketball players in uniforms with visible numbers 23, 12, and 14 are on a wooden court during a game or practice, with one player in a white jersey gesturing while others observe.
Map of Spain The image displays a map highlighting Spain in green, with an inset world map indicating its global location, and also shows the Canary Islands off the coast.

Wheelchair basketball team A group of female athletes in wheelchairs and a coach pose with a trophy on a wooden court, in front of a backdrop with logos and text, including "WHEELCHAIR BASKETBALL" and "NATIONAL CHAMPIONS".

Group of people disembarking from an airplane A crowd of individuals, some carrying bags and flags, walks across an airport tarmac toward the foreground, with a large aircraft and distant hills visible in the background.
Fish A black-and-white striped fish with spotted fins swims in an aquarium with blurred green aquatic plants and white gravel in the background.
Piano keyboard diagram A diagram of a piano keyboard showing labeled keys including R1, S, G1, M2, P, D2, N2, and S, with black and white keys arranged in a standard pattern.
A Plan of the Delaware River An antique map depicting the Delaware River and surrounding regions, with labeled geographical features and a compass rose in the lower-left corner.

Ancient stone monument in a garden A weathered stone monument with carved reliefs stands in a grassy area surrounded by trees and other stone structures, suggesting an archaeological site or historical garden.

Coat of Arms A shield divided vertically into blue and green sections, featuring a white tower with a black arched doorway, flanked by yellow leaves, and topped with a yellow stylized "T" with three vertical bars.

Modern building with a prominent black vertical panel A contemporary building with a black vertical panel featuring a crest and the word "COURT" is situated on a street under a clear blue sky, with a sidewalk and streetlamp visible.
Flag of the Republic of the Philippines A blue field with a golden sun with eight rays above a golden crescent moon.
Industrial complex with mining equipment A brick building with a large metal headframe and conveyor system stands in an industrial area with other structures and open ground under an overcast sky.

Traditional Chinese architectural structures A weathered white building with a red-tiled roof stands in front of larger traditional Chinese-style buildings with curved eaves and tiled roofs under a clear blue sky.
Shea Butter Container An open metal tin of shea butter with a partially used applicator and a labeled lid displaying "Return of the Madam" and "Shea Butter" on a wooden surface.
Large gathering of people in a hall A dense crowd of individuals, mostly dressed in dark clothing, is seated facing a stage at the far end of a large indoor hall with religious or ceremonial decor.

White Buddha Statue A large white statue of a standing Buddha is positioned outdoors in front of a traditional Japanese-style temple building with a dark roof, surrounded by green trees and mountains under an overcast sky.

Marble effigy of a reclining figure A white marble sculpture of a reclining figure, possibly a deceased person, is displayed within an ornate, dark wooden and stone recessed niche in a dimly lit interior space.

South Monument A tall, reddish-brown stone monument with engraved text and a circular emblem reading "SOUTH" stands in a dry, open field under a clear blue sky, surrounded by sparse vegetation and rocks.
GDP Growth % A bar chart displaying GDP growth percentages for fiscal years 2012 through 2018, with values ranging from approximately 3.5% to 5.5%.

Modern architectural complex A contemporary building with a large glass and metal canopy structure, set against a clear blue sky with scattered clouds, surrounded by paved walkways and landscaped greenery.
Stadion am Bieberer Berg An aerial view of the football stadium surrounded by green fields, autumnal trees, and urban buildings in a city setting.

Cherry blossom tree A large, fully bloomed cherry blossom tree with dense pink flowers stands in a park-like setting under a clear blue sky, surrounded by green grass, a low fence, and other trees in early spring.
Man in formal attire A man wearing a dark suit, white shirt, and red patterned tie stands indoors against a backdrop of curtains and a plant.
Cricket player A man in cricket attire is bent over, holding a bat in a ready stance on a grassy field with a white picket fence in the background.

Group of men in traditional attire Four men, including one seated in the foreground wearing a turban and light-colored clothing, are posed outdoors in a black-and-white photograph, with three standing behind him in formal or traditional dress.
Maryland county map with highlighted area A map of Maryland shows a specific county highlighted in red, with a close-up inset on the left indicating the location of that county within the state.
Art gallery interior A dimly lit gallery space with multiple framed paintings on the walls, a single bench in the center, and a dark reflective floor.
Highway road scene A two-lane asphalt road with a yellow center line, bordered by trees and a concrete barrier on the left, under a clear blue sky.
Modern office building entrance A multi-story building with a grid of windows and a covered entranceway, flanked by bare trees on a paved walkway.

Two men posing for a photograph Two men are standing close together indoors, one wearing a red turtleneck and black jacket, the other in a light green polo shirt with a lanyard bearing a white ID badge.
Building with sign and parking lot A single-story brick building with a dark roof, surrounded by evergreen trees and a gravel parking lot with parked vehicles under a clear blue sky.
Woman with long hair A black-and-white portrait of a smiling woman with long, straight hair wearing a textured knit sweater, set against a plain background.
Man in suit and sunglasses A man wearing a dark suit, white shirt, dark tie, and sunglasses is shown in a black-and-white photograph, with a white pocket square visible.

Red brick building with arched windows and gabled roof A large, historic-style red brick building with multiple arched windows, a gabled roof, and visible chimneys, situated in an open area with bare trees and a paved foreground.
Airport terminal building A modern airport terminal building with "AIRPORT" signage on its roof, surrounded by parked vehicles and a pedestrian walkway under a clear blue sky.
Two-story house with porch A white, two-story house with a gray roof and front porch, surrounded by trees and a red walkway, with a historical marker visible on the right side of the property.
A man in a blue robe with a brown cloak The man stands barefoot on a rocky terrain, holding his head with both hands, with a brown cloak draped over his shoulders and a belt around his waist.
